nasb.text: So they were saying, “What is this that He says, ‘A little while’? We do not know what He is talking about.”

esv.text: So they were saying, “What does he mean by ‘a little while’? We do not know what he is talking about.”

cnv.text: 他們又說：“他所說的‘不久’，是甚麼意思呢？我們不曉得他在講甚麼。”

ccb.text: 祂说‘不久’是什么意思呢？我们真不明白！”

csbs.text: 他们又说：“他说的‘过一会儿’是什么意思呢？我们不明白他在说什么。”
